# Go2Rinjani

> Go2Rinjani is a premier trekking agency based in Senaru, Lombok, Indonesia. We specialize in organizing professional, safe, and eco-friendly guided trekking tours to Mount Rinjani (3,726m), Segara Anak crater lake, and Senaru waterfalls.

We employ certified local Sasak guides and porters, prioritize mountain conservation, and provide high-quality camping gear for all climbs.

## Core Pages

- [Home Page](https://go2rinjani.com/): Welcome screen, featured packages overview, and booking access.
- [Trekking Tours](https://go2rinjani.com/tours): Main directory of Mount Rinjani trekking packages (2D1N, 3D2N, 4D3N) with detailed itineraries.
- [About Us](https://go2rinjani.com/about): Our story, values, certified local guide team, and community-based tourism approach in Lombok.
- [Blog & Guides](https://go2rinjani.com/blog): Essential guides on preparation, packing lists, weather forecasts, and route comparisons.
- [How It Works](https://go2rinjani.com/how-it-works): Comprehensive explanation of the booking process, pickup services, and trek preparation.
- [Contact Us](https://go2rinjani.com/contact): Operations base location, email, and direct WhatsApp contact channels for inquiries.

## Mount Rinjani Packages

- [2-Day Sembalun Summit Trek](https://go2rinjani.com/tours/mount-rinjani-trek/2-day-sembalun-summit): 2 days and 1 night trek focusing on reaching the 3,726m summit from the Sembalun route.
- [2-Day Senaru Crater Rim Trek](https://go2rinjani.com/tours/mount-rinjani-trek/2-day-senaru-crater-rim): 2 days and 1 night trek to the Senaru crater rim, offering spectacular sunset views of the lake.
- [3-Day Sembalun Summit & Crater Lake Trek](https://go2rinjani.com/tours/mount-rinjani-trek/3-day-sembalun-summit-lake): 3 days and 2 nights classic itinerary covering the summit, Segara Anak lake, hot springs, and Senaru rim.
- [3-Day Senaru Crater Rim & Lake Trek](https://go2rinjani.com/tours/mount-rinjani-trek/3-day-senaru-lake): 3 days and 2 nights trekking via Senaru, descending to the lake and hot springs, returning via Senaru.
- [4-Day Sembalun Expedition](https://go2rinjani.com/tours/mount-rinjani-trek/4-day-sembalun-expedition): A leisurely 4 days and 3 nights trek covering all highlights with extra rest times at the lake.
- [4-Day Senaru Summit & Lake Trek](https://go2rinjani.com/tours/mount-rinjani-trek/4-day-senaru-summit-lake): 4 days and 3 nights trek starting from Senaru, visiting the lake, hot springs, and summiting on Day 3.

## Mount Stampol Packages

- [Mount Stampol Trek](https://go2rinjani.com/tours/mount-stampol-trek): Guided hiking itinerary to Mount Stampol for alternative panoramic views.

## Practical Information

- [Payment & Booking Policies](https://go2rinjani.com/payment-information): Guides on deposit requirements, cancellations, and accepted payment methods (PayPal, Revolut, Wise).
- [FAQ](https://go2rinjani.com/faq): Answers to frequently asked questions about physical preparation, weather conditions, packing lists, and toilets on the mountain.

## Optional

- [Cancellation Policy](https://go2rinjani.com/legal/cancellation-policy): Complete cancellation and refund terms for all bookings.
- [Terms & Conditions](https://go2rinjani.com/legal/terms-and-conditions): Legal terms, safety waivers, and booking agreements.
- [Privacy Policy](https://go2rinjani.com/legal/privacy-policy): How we protect and manage customer personal details.
- [Cookie Policy](https://go2rinjani.com/legal/cookie-policy): Details on cookies used on the website.
